title: Partition pruning fails with explicit time_zone offset in datetime literal
poc:
CREATE TABLE `tp` (
`id` int unsigned NOT NULL,
`ts` timestamp NOT NULL,
`v` float DEFAULT NULL,
PRIMARY KEY (`id`,`ts`)
)
PARTITION BY RANGE (unix_timestamp(`ts`))
(
PARTITION p202001 VALUES LESS THAN (1580515200),
PARTITION p202002 VALUES LESS THAN (1583020800)
);
key_bug_features: Partition pruning fails with time zone offset in datetime literals
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE `tp` (`id` int unsigned NOT NULL, `ts` timestamp NOT NULL, `v` float DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`,`ts`)) PARTITION BY RANGE (unix_timestamp(`ts`)) (PARTITION p202001 VALUES LESS THAN (1580515200), PARTITION p202002 VALUES LESS THAN (1583020800));
